sizing_rule.note: Vince optimal f geometric progression rule. Advance from 1 to 2 contracts when account equity reaches converted threshold. Threshold conversion accounts for starting equity, base threshold T, largest historical loss, and optimal f value. Position size scales geometrically via optimal f framework.

source_rule_text: Convert threshold for geometric progression of contracts from 1 to 2 based on starting equity, threshold level, biggest historical loss, and optimal f value.
